creator: poyopoyo@puripuri.plala.or.jp
text:
Hi,

Good find, I've overlooked these dependency due to incorrect grepping
INDEX. It should be GraphicsMagick-1.3 instead of
GraphicsMagick13. I've just finished building and packaging xastir and
gimp-gmic-plugin without any flaw. So I think it is safe to update to
GraphicsMagick-1.3.14 and to notify these ports maintainers is enough
to be done.

-- 
kuro
